---
title: "Appendix B: The ChatGPT Prompt Library for R"
appendix: true
---

## Formula Translation Prompt

> I use Excel for business reporting. Translate this formula into R using tidyverse syntax. Explain each part in plain language and show a small example.

## Join Logic Prompt

> I have two tables. One contains employee master data and one contains payroll records. Show me how to merge them in R using employee_id as the key. Also tell me how to check for unmatched rows.

## Summary Prompt

> Translate this pivot table goal into R: total revenue by region and month, sorted descending by revenue.

## Validation Prompt

> I wrote this R code to replace an Excel report. Tell me how to verify row counts, totals, missing joins, and output quality before I send the report.

Placeholder for expanded prompt library.
